body.title: agent_datacenter: inference device — comms:// unification validation target
body.description:
Implement the inference device. Its primary role is to validate comms:// unification — Igor talking to inference must use the identical call pattern as Igor talking to Claude.

Proposed shape:
- agent_datacenter/devices/inference/device.py:
  class InferenceDevice(BaseDevice):
    who_am_i() → {'name': 'inference', 'endpoint': inference_endpoint_url, 'model': current_model}
    capabilities() → {'inference': True, 'streaming': True, 'comms_unified': True}
    comms() → {'read_write': True, 'push': False, 'pull': True, 'nudge': False}
    health() → {'endpoint_reachable': bool, 'latency_ms': float, 'error_rate': float}
    restart() / halt() → for external endpoints: health recheck + reconnect; shim defines semantics
    where_and_how() → {'endpoint': url, 'type': 'openrouter'|'local'|'anthropic', 'auth': 'env:OR_API_KEY'}
- comms:// routing: Router.send('comms://inference') routes to InferenceDevice's IMAP mailbox
  Igor sends to comms://inference for inference requests — identical to comms://CC.0 for CC messages

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/inference/device.py
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/inference/shim.py

Design rules:
- oop-first: InferenceDevice class; shim handles the 'restart = health recheck' semantics for external endpoints
- no-sqlite: inference state kept in memory only

Scope boundary:
IN: full BaseDevice implementation for inference endpoint; shim with 'restart = reconnect' semantics
OUT: YGM/Nudge pipeline (T-adc-ygm-nudge-pipeline), comms unification test (T-adc-inference-comms-unification-test)

Test plan:
- InferenceDevice() instantiates (all abstract methods implemented)
- health() returns {endpoint_reachable: True/False} without raising on connection error
- restart() calls shim.restart() which does a health recheck, not a process kill
- comms://inference resolves to InferenceDevice's mailbox via Router
